title: eco
summary:
This document details **Assignment-2 for the course Computer Eco-System (25CSH-102)**. It consists of five distinct sets of questions, each focusing on two core areas: **Operating Systems (OS)** and **Computer Networking**. Key topics include OS resource management, comparisons of different OS architectures (like Linux vs. Windows), virtualization, network hierarchies (LAN/WAN/MAN), and the technical protocols that enable internet communication (TCP/IP, DNS, and IP addressing).

### Actionable Next Steps for the Student

1.  **Confirm Your Assigned Set:**
    Check with your instructor or the syllabus to see if you are required to answer **all five sets** or if you have been assigned a **specific set** (e.g., Set 1 or Set 3) based on your roll number or group.

2.  **Prepare Technical Diagrams:**
    Several questions (specifically in Sets 1, 2, and 5) ask you to "illustrate" or "detail each step." Don't just write text; draft diagrams for the **DNS resolution process** and the **data flow from user request to server response** to earn higher marks.

3.  **Research Real-World Scenarios:**
    The assignment requires more than just definitions; it asks for "real-world scenarios" (Set 1) and "practical examples" regarding IoT (Set 4). Start identifying specific examples now, such as how a smartphone handles multitasking or how a smart home thermostat uses networking protocols.
